steps.t: Orc-camps lie to the north-west and south of Aldburg. Arcil would like you to assess the threat posed to the Eastfold by scouting the nearby Orc-camps…
Arcil is in the Mead Hall of Aldburg. You scouted the Orc-camps and now have a better idea of their number. You should return to Aldburg and convey th…
